original: You are grappled by the overqueen! The caesselian’s tail ripples with muscular contractions, applying just a bit more coercive pressure to your bound and helpless form. original: [var1 |Strength, trickery, and a little sleight of hand: you bend and twist like an eel, testing [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora’s |the mad Jumper’s ] power. She reactively descends on your [pc.arms], squeezing inner muscles to pulp. It hurts real bad, but it gets the juices flowing. It’s not your arms that she needs to worry about, but your hips — you buck upwards, break her grip; once again you buck, roll over, and enter into a grapple palm-to-palm. It breaks almost right away as she goes for the face — you dodge it, send it right back, and scrabble away. Before you can wonder how you’ll get the handcuffs off, it automatically unsnaps with an unfriendly little zap. The metal loops fly straight into the Jumper’s hand, who pockets them with the wickedest snarl. “Rrrrkkkkkkkk...” |Brute strength, catlike agility... none of these things will save you. Think of this wire as no different from an anaconda winding around its prey, crushing the life from them. Lull her into a false sense of security...! Instead of shimmying front, left, or right, you rear your head back as much as her pull will allow, take a deep breath to slacken her grip, and let go. Pretending to falter, failing to struggle, these actions delude her. The tautness loosens for but one second, and you seize the wire, wriggling all your [pc.fingers] past it and yanking it away. Thread slips from fingers. [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The laquine ] takes in your success with abject confusion, as though her eyes cannot believe what they behold. It’s just enough time to sock her right in the jaw and earn your freedom, fuzzy-minded as it is. Raw enervation collects in your [pc.legOrLegs]; you want to run, get away from here, but you can’t. She’ll chase you. Shoot you in the back. [var0 |Considering your lowered reserves of energy, you’re going to need to fight carefully from here on, or flee! ] “Chhsshhhh; hfffm,” she... ‘says’, head tilted. Curiosity, or animosity? The wire retracts into her vambrace like the tongue of a snake. Out of sight, but not out of mind. ]

original: “Geh...” Time flutters to a crawl. Did that just happen? It’s in the laquine’s eyes (next to all the [pc.milkNoun]) - a moment of confusion and a whole lot of derision. Wiping the [pc.milkVisc], [pc.milkColor] splatters from her suit, she huffs a feral breath and triples her efforts. Not only was that a bit less effective than you hoped... being spattered in breast-[pc.milkNoun] has only heightened her anger by a few factors. “Kh...” This is all suddenly terrifying: how fast the battle just stopped, how the laquine just stands there. An awkward century passes. Wishful thinking, but what if being showered in milk has corrupted her programming? Maybe she’s a perfect synth...! No, not at all. Reality asserts, and she stretches her body backwards, letting out a hoarse growl of a scream. “Grrrrraagh!!” Hunching forward, her posture shifts from murderous poise to something rabid and barbaric - she’s berserking. A chaos god’s rage storms towards you, now.
